/usr/bin/ar qc libimgui_sdl.a CMakeFiles/imgui_sdl.dir/_deps/imgui-src/imgui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/imgui_sdl.dir/_deps/imgui-src/imgui_draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/imgui_sdl.dir/_deps/imgui-src/imgui_tables.cpp.o CMakeFiles/imgui_sdl.dir/_deps/imgui-src/imgui_widgets.cpp.o CMakeFiles/imgui_sdl.dir/_deps/imgui-src/imgui_demo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/imgui_sdl.dir/_deps/imgui-src/backends/imgui_impl_sdl2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/imgui_sdl.dir/_deps/imgui-src/backends/imgui_impl_sdlrenderer2.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libimgui_sdl.a
